name: Aeries Technology, Inc.
business: Aeries Technology is a global professional services and technology consulting firm that provides specialized expertise to private equity firms' portfolio companies and middle-market, technology-enabled enterprises, focusing on the strategic planning, establishment, and operational management of Global Capability Centers (GCCs).

exposures.sentence: A core part of our service offering focuses on AI and digital transformation.
Cybersecurity: Designed to secure assets and operations against cyber threats through comprehensive security approaches tailored to specific business requirements.

tamClaims.claim: $115 billion global GCC investment in 2025, growing to $155 billion by 2027 at 15% CAGR
tamClaims.sentence: Enterprise investment in offshore and nearshore GCCs reached approximately $115 billion in 2025, supporting over 6,350 centers and employing more than 3.4 million professionals worldwide. Industry projections indicate this market will grow to $155 billion by 2027, representing a compound annual growth rate of approximately 15%, with employment expected to exceed 4.0 million professionals.

tamClaims.claim: Provider-supported GCC services segment projected to reach nearly $40 billion by 2027 at 25% CAGR
tamClaims.sentence: This segment is projected to reach nearly $40 billion by 2027, with estimated annual growth of approximately 25% as enterprises increasingly seek specialized external expertise throughout the GCC lifecycle.

tamClaims.claim: $98.4 billion revenue from 2,117 GCCs in India
tamClaims.sentence: Within the India market where we maintain established operations, 583 GCCs specifically serve mid-market companies with annual revenues below $500 million, representing a core component of our addressable market within a broader ecosystem of 2,117 GCCs generating $98.4 billion in revenue and employing 2.36 million professionals.
